feed.title: SAP Community - SAP AI Launchpad
feed.subtitle: SAP AI Launchpad Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP AI Core: proxy deployment: url not found
entry.content:
I'm currently doing a sap tutorial on the sap ai core. But whenever I try to access my deploy azure open ai model via sap core i.ex via the deployment url I get from the btp, I get the error that the url is not found. I already tested my proxy i.ex my connection to azure openAi. I can correctly communicate with my deployed AzureModel directly via azure but whenever I try to communicate via Ai core it doesn't work. Can someone maybe help me?

that's my url from the deployment: https://api.ai.prod.eu-central-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2/inference/deployments/d6f2fc3a1054d348

and according to this tutorial: https://github.com/SAP-samples/azure-openai-aicore-cap-api/blob/main/01-ai-core-azure-openai-proxy/proxy.ipynb

I should be able to make a chat completion call with the endpoint: https://api.ai.prod.eu-central-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2/inference/deployments/d6f2fc3a1054d348/v2/envs

I don't know why v2/envs is added and I can't find it in the SAP AI core documentation (envs and v2 aren't files in the project either)

Appreciate the help, thanks !

entry.title: AI Launchpad: Unable to retrieve the resource group. Error Code: 02000001
entry.content:
Hi

I am connecting AI Launchpad to AI Core and when doing so, I get following error:

HTTP request returns:

When doing the same through Postman, I am able to get metadata, so connection works, but when I try to call some of admin endpoints like for example /admin/resources/nodes, I am getting message: RBAC: access denied

Any pointers?

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad NoSuchKey Error in Deployment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ai-core-deploy.html

I'm getting below error when I create a deployment:botocore.errorfactory.NoSuchKey: An error occurred (NoSuchKey) when calling the ListObjects operation: The specified key does not exist.

I have given a proper path to aws S3, the "Default" in object secrets and it is matching with aws URL.

Deployment status is showing as 'PENDING'.

Kindly help us to resolve the error.

Thanks.

entry.title: CalledProcessError while generating docker image
entry.content:
Hi, all i am new to machine learning , currently building meter reading model by following blog


https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cv-package-aicore-train-object-detection.html#d5f4c082-b0ef-486a-8aa5-7f12a009bcfb

on step for generating docker image for training, i am facing error anyone can help please

entry.title: How to get the custom Id of machine learning scenario in SAP AI Core ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am following blog in step 4

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cv-package-aicore-train-object-detection.html#d0ab0dd4-6f20-452a-9a83-c7ea157282f7

to build machine learning model in between ,I require ID for this code snippet.

workflow_config = { "name": "sap-cv-package-tutorial-obj-detection-train", "image": "<YOUR_DOCKER_USERNAME>/sap-cv-package-object-detection-train:0.0.1", "labels": { "scenarios.ai.sap.com/id": "sap-cv-package-tutorial", "ai.sap.com/version": "0.0.1" }, "annotations": { "scenarios.ai.sap.com/name": "SAP CV Package Tutorial", }, "imagePullSecret": "<YOUR_DOCKER_SECRET>", "objectStoreSecret": "default-object-store-secret" }

Thanks please help

entry.title: Doubt about the use of Standard SSD Storage
entry.content:
Hi! We want to use llama2-7b in SAP AI core, we only want to do an inference to the model and I am struggling with understanding the prices. My question is if we are going to use SSD storage in order to implement the model and if that is the case, which resources are going to be stored there, because as far as I understand, the model is going to be stored in a bucket in AWS S3.

I have another question related to that, in the onboarding it is said to use the entitlement "object store" to upload the model, but in the Felix Bartler's Blog I see that he brings the model from Huggingface, so my question is what are the beneffits and limitations of both cases.

Thank you

entry.title: Error: Could not connect to the endpoint URL while deploying Tutorial Model
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to AI Core and followed the Tutorial Series to get to know the environment. (Make Predictions for House Prices with SAP AI Core | SAP Tutorials)


Unfortunately I've encountered an error I am unable to resolve. In the last steps of the Tutorial, while trying to deploy the model on a server, the error "Could not connect to the endpoint URL" appears.

I would be very grateful for your assistance.

entry.title: How to integrate sap ai core into a cap application
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am going through the AI core development tutorial and I am in the half way. In the tutorial we are using python and docker to develop ai model. Here my question is how can we integrate these AI model into our existing CAP based java applications. Please guide me or provide me a link to help material.

Thanks,

Harinath

entry.title: Unable to add a new Docker registry secret to AI-core
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When I try to add docker secret key to ai core from ai-launchpad I am getting below error. Kindly check and suggest us what could be the reason for this error.

Thanks,

Harinath

entry.title: Sap AI Core Error while prediction
entry.content:
Hi folk,

I am working on SAP House Prediction usecase but after deployment I try to post it on Postman by using this generated url " https://api.ai.prod.us-east-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2/inference/deployments/d1994d2a0c950f4a/v2/predict" but its showing error after posting the request " FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: "/mnt/models/model.pkl" .

SAP AI Core Deployment-

AWS S3 bucket(model.pkl)-

I have dought that I encountered the error because of this STORAGE_URI in executable.yaml which is present in GitHub " set -e && echo "Starting" && gunicorn --chdir /app/src main:app -b 0.0.0.0:9001 # filename `main` flask variable `app` env: - name: STORAGE_URI # Required value: "{{inputs.artifacts.housepricemodel}}" # Required reference from artifact name, see above - name: greetingmessage # different name to avoid confusion value: "{{inputs.parameters.greetmessage}}"
GitHub(Server-Executable.yaml)

what exactly the cause of error and can anyone please address me to solve this error?

entry.title: Forbidden AI Launchpad
entry.content: When trying to open AI Launchpad, the webpage just says "Forbidden". This happened after subscribing to the SAP Build Zone service, which also subscribed me to some Identity Verification service. I thought deleting all the services might resolve the problem, but did not seem to help. Can someone guide my in making sure that my user has the correct permissions?

entry.title: First AI Project AI Core: Execution does not write Log
entry.content:
Hi,

I am building my first AI Project (Create Your First Machine Learning Project using SAP AI Core) --> Quick Start for Your First AI Project Using SAP AI Core

I connected GitHub to SAP AI Core, checked the sync status of my app, created scenarios and workflows.

But when displaying the Logs after execution, the Log is empty.

Expected content of Log: "Yes......"

as coded print("Yes.....")

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: first-pipeline-natth
  annotations:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/description: "Introduction to SAP AI Core"
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/name: "Tutorial"
    executables.ai.sap.com/description: "Greets the user"
    executables.ai.sap.com/name: "Hello Pipeline"
  labels:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/id: "learning"
    ai.sap.com/version: "2.0"
spec:
  entrypoint: mypipeline
  templates:
  - name: mypipeline
    steps:
    - - name: greet
        template: greeter

  - name: greeter
    container:
      image: docker.io/python:latest
      command:
        - python3
        - '-c'
      args:
       - |
        print("Yes.....")<br>

Thanks for your support!

Till

entry.title: Generative AI Hub enabled in our SAP AI Launchpad App
entry.content: We would like to get Generative AI Hub enabled in our SAP AI Launchpad App subscription.

entry.title: not able to add - SAP AI launchpad
entry.content:
Hello,

I get an error message as - you do not have permission to add this plan, while trying to add Free service of AI launchpad.

what could be the reason behind this error message?

Br.

entry.title: Unavailability of AI Core and AI Launchpad in discovery center
entry.content:
Is there a reason that the SAP AI Core and SAP AI launchpad are not showing up in the discovery center?

These services show up as free tier in the SAP Discovery Center. But when I try to add this service in my sub account, it does not show up as a service plan for my account.

Can anyone help me with this? I am facing this error while trying to follow the following tutorial. Also another tutorial.
Thanks!

entry.title: SAP AI LAUNCHPAD: Dead process after 23 hours (expected was 3 minutes)
entry.content:
I followed the tutorial:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ai-core-code.html#77ca6fba-fb46-4a1d-9506-f08faa01c597

And I get the execution dead after 23 hours running, (expected was 3 minutes)
I can see this on the status logs:


{
"details": [],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "e0ff479e3f86f885",
"message": "",
"name": "e0ff479e3f86f885",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Running",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "e0ff479e3f86f885-3522031913",
"message": "",
"name": "e0ff479e3f86f885[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Running",
"type": "StepGroup"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "e0ff479e3f86f885-691995057",
"message": "pods \"e0ff479e3f86f885-mycodeblock1-691995057\" is forbidden: exceeded quota: free-tier-resource-quota, requested: pods=1, used: pods=1, limited: pods=1",
"name": "e0ff479e3f86f885[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Pending",
"type": "Pod"
}
]
}

After the status is DEAD, I can see this status logs:


{
"details": [],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "ecc3d9c13c9def36",
"message": "ef36[0].mypredictor error: Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook \"***\": failed to call webhook: Post ***/mutate-core-v1-pod-first?timeout=10s\": dial tcp ***:9443: connect: connection refused...",
"name": "ecc3d9c13c9def36",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "ecc3d9c13c9def36-21680469",
"message": "Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook \"***\": failed to call webhook: Post ***/mutate-core-v1-pod-first?timeout=10s\": dial tcp ***:9443: connect: connection refused",
"name": "ecc3d9c13c9def36[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Error",
"type": "Pod"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "ecc3d9c13c9def36-486764093",
"message": "ef36[0].mypredictor error: Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook \"***\": failed to call webhook: Post ***/mutate-core-v1-pod-first?timeout=10s\": dial tcp ***:9443: connect: connection refused...",
"name": "ecc3d9c13c9def36[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Error",
"type": "StepGroup"
}
]

Anybody knows where is my error?

Thank you

entry.title: Accessing a service deployed in sap ai launchpad via postman/CODE
entry.content:
hi,

we have created and deployed a service through ai launchpad, and have a service url.however i need to hit this api and get the response in my code. when i hit the url through postman i get 404 error.

can someone please guide me in this?

my query is: i want to access the api deployed via sap launchpad in my code and display results as part of app.

entry.title: Generative AI Core Streaming Chat Completion Response
entry.content:
Hi all,

me and my team are working with the mission related to the AI Core "Develop a CAP-based (multitenant) application using GenAI and RAG".

In this mission the service works with OpenAI API, and taking inspiration from it, we have implemented our own solution.

In our project we replicate the chat completion and all works fine but we have some problems when we try to convert the method in the below screen with the stream parameter set to true.

Setting this parameter in that way we can replicate the chatGPT behavior with the typing simulation of it's response.

Can anyone help us with this implementation?

Thank you for your time. It is very much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Not able to login to SAP AI Launchpad.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

   I have enabled the SAP AI Launchpad service using the booster, service created successfully and assigned the proper roles. But when I opened the application URL, it is not letting me in. Could you please help me on this. 

You can find the below screenshot, the page is hanging like below.

Thank you

entry.title: How should SAP embrace SAP AI?
entry.content:
I would like to express my sincere gratitude for considering my inquiry.

SAP has made significant investments in the field of artificial intelligence, and I have been fascinated by   AI  JOULE. I am impressed with the concept of end users being able to operate and configure the SAP system through natural language. Moreover, SAP Business AI appears to provide users with valuable implementation recommendations, based on the analysis of business data. This integration of AI into the SAP system enables users to interact with it in a more intuitive and efficient manner, thereby enhancing the overall user experience.

However, as I embark on my journey as a new SAP consultant,  I am curious to know to

1) What extent AI will challenge the role of SAP consultants in the future?  How far is the future?

2) Given this rapid technological shift, I am also wondering what steps a new SAP consultant should take to embrace this change and stay ahead of the curve. What knowledge or skills should we acquire to face the challenges posed by artificial intelligence?

3) In this era of SAP AI,  what is the most effective and efficient way to learn SAP?

Your guidance and expertise in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you once again for considering my questions, and I look forward to your responses.
